close_reason: Implemented in Demux.Server - sends {:min_durable_version, version} to log when durability advances
description:
Implement the feedback loop where logs track minimum_durable_version from demux:

1. Demux tracks which version has been durably stored by all downstream materializers
2. Demux reports this back to its log periodically or on request
3. Log server tracks and exposes minimum_durable_version (currently returns :unavailable)

Files:
- lib/bedrock/data_plane/log/shale/facts.ex - Replace :unavailable with actual tracking
- lib/bedrock/data_plane/log/shale/server.ex - Track durable version from demux feedback

This enables log trimming: logs can trim to the minimum durable version common across all logs.
title: Implement demux → log durability reporting (minimum_durable_version)
